case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CLEBER CAIXETA CARVALHO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,656.65 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARVALHO, CLEBER CAIXETA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARVALHO, CLEBER CAIXETA $1,656.65 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,756.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-26-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARVALHO, CLEBER CAIXETA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CLEBER CAIXETA CARVALHO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARVALHO, CLEBER CAIXETA
